class Temperature:
    _kelvin: float
    
    const ABSOLUTE_ZERO: float = -273.15
    
    def __init__(self, celsius: float):
        self._kelvin = self._to_kelvin(celsius)
    
    def _to_kelvin(self, celsius: float) -> float:
        return celsius - self.ABSOLUTE_ZERO
    
    def _to_celsius(self, kelvin: float) -> float:
        return kelvin + self.ABSOLUTE_ZERO
    
    property get celsius(self) -> float:
        return self._to_celsius(self._kelvin)
    
    property set celsius(self, value: float):
        if value < self.ABSOLUTE_ZERO:
            self._kelvin = 0.0
        else:
            self._kelvin = self._to_kelvin(value)
    
    property get fahrenheit(self) -> float:
        return self.celsius * 9.0 / 5.0 + 32.0
    
    property get kelvin(self) -> float:
        return self._kelvin

class Sensor(Temperature):
    _id: str
    
    def __init__(self, id: str, initial_celsius: float):
        super().__init__(initial_celsius)
        self._id = id
    
    property get id(self) -> str:
        return self._id
    
    property get status(self) -> str:
        if self.celsius < -50.0:
            return "extreme_cold"
        elif self.celsius > 50.0:
            return "extreme_heat"
        else:
            return "normal"
